diagnostics.headline: CS/min 7.1 vs your 3.6 norm — above your level

players.name: Xeebs
matchupItemFlags: no armor vs a 3-physical enemy comp

notes: Willy Guggenheim (offlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-2 into a numbers advantage.
Xeebs (jungle) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
🎮 private (midlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-3 into a numbers advantage.

Willy Guggenheim (offlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-2 into a numbers advantage.
ItsAMeLui (support) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-3 into a numbers advantage.
🎮 private (midlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-3 into a numbers advantage.
ItsAMeLui (support) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-4 into a numbers advantage.
ItsAMeLui (support) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 2-3 into a numbers advantage.
Enemy had 1 healer; only 1 of you carried anti-heal — usually wants two vs a heal comp.
Their main damage was Bayle (26k physical); 2/5 of you itemized armor.
Enemy ran 2/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 2 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Cuban Noobster (midlane→carry), Willy Guggenheim (offlane→jungle).

coaching.headline: A 3-stack run off the map — towers 1–9, objectives 4–25. The two solo lanes held even but the team got sieged out by 27 minutes.
coaching.team: Trio of you (Willy/Cuban/Xeebs) plus two randoms; the map collapsed (1 tower to 9). Xeebs' Crunch fed 9 deaths (his Khaimera norm is 5) and the jungle losing that hard hands over every objective. The lane matchups were close-to-fine on pred.gg — this was a fights-and-map loss, not a draft one.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Stop forcing fights when behind on towers — Xeebs especially. Play for vision and a single Fangtooth pick instead of feeding the siege.

perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Crunch jungle, 1/9 — 9 deaths vs your 5 norm. The jungler feeding doubles the map loss; when towers are slipping, path safe and stop diving.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: The Fey mid (2/5) into a favored Wraith (57.2%) — you had the edge on paper and went even; the loss was the map, not your lane.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Aurora offlane, CS well above your norm and only 4 deaths into a favored Bayle — your lane was the bright spot. The macro got away from the team late; nothing on you individually.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Bayle Kingslayer (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Adele. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Crunch Right Crunch (knockup 1.25s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Bramble Patch slow → Harvest Nettles stacks → Untamed Growth DoT → Fly Trap pull ult
ourKits.winCondition: Fly Trap a clumped team and detonate AoE on the pull
ourKits.passive: takedowns spawn growths + grant move speed
ourKits.playWith: engage that clumps for her Fly Trap
ourKits.playAgainst: spread out vs the pull; she's squishy — dive her

ourKits.combo: Old Rusty slow → Gag Grenade silence → Rad Rounds basics → Shrapnel Cannon armor shred
ourKits.winCondition: kite back, stack Wastelander bleed and Rad Rounds, melt from range
ourKits.playWith: peel and frontline so he can free-fire
ourKits.playAgainst: low mobility — dive him or break LoS through his poke; he folds to hard engage

ourKits.combo: Boreal Sweep slow → Hoarfrost root → Glacial Charge engage → Cryoseism stun ult
ourKits.winCondition: chain frost CC (slow→root→stun) to lock the fight down
ourKits.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
ourKits.playAgainst: she's a CC battery — cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

ourKits.combo: Forward Crunch gap-close stun → Right Crunch knockup → empowered Left Crunch, sustain via Re-Crunch
ourKits.winCondition: all-in a squishy with the empowered combo and heal back through Re-Crunch
ourKits.passive: post-ability empowered basic that refunds cooldowns
ourKits.playWith: peel-stripping engage so he reaches the backline
ourKits.playAgainst: peel/CC him off — without resets he's stranded; anti-heal blunts Re-Crunch

enemyKits.combo: Skull Crusher gap-close → Dire Howl slow → Cursed Edge → Kingslayer knockback dash, Berserk at low HP
enemyKits.winCondition: engage, drop low into Berserk and out-brawl
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up while he commits the dive
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Berserk rewards low HP — burst him fully or disengage; anti-heal helps

enemyKits.combo: Vortex Grenade → Vaporize pierce → Rocket Dash reposition → Ventilate ult
enemyKits.winCondition: reposition with Rocket Dash and unload Ventilate from safety
enemyKits.passive: abilities grant AS + a triple-shot next basic
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline to create his free-fire window
enemyKits.playAgainst: he's mobile but squishy — CC through the dash, then burst

enemyKits.combo: Peekaboo! mark+slow → Knock, Knock! sniper → Back It Up! displacement ult
enemyKits.winCondition: land long-range snipes on marked targets and reset on takedowns
enemyKits.playWith: engage that holds a target in his sniper line
enemyKits.playAgainst: close the gap — he's weak point-blank; dodge the skillshot snipe

enemyKits.combo: Rushing Beat dashes → Line Tempo wolves → Circle Rhythm shield → All-Kill! wolfpack ult
enemyKits.winCondition: stack Track and unleash All-Kill! in a grouped fight
enemyKits.playAgainst: spread vs the wolfpack; she's squishy without her shield up
